prompt_task: Set up the Saluki model detailed in https://doi.org/10.1186/s13059-022-02811-x and use it to optimize the 3' UTR of the mRNA sequence GCCGCCACCATGGTGAGCAAGGGCGAGTAGTGTACATAATAAGGACT. Specifically, perform 3 rounds of directed evolution, trying every possible substitution in the 3' UTR and choosing the best after each round. Always use the average of predictions across all folds and use only the human output. Make sure to use GPUs if available. Report the full sequence of the optimized mRNA. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
